/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/journal2-widget.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/journal2-widget.dir/journal2-widget_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/journal2-widget.dir/src/journal2/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/journal2-widget.dir/src/journal2/Journal2Widget.cpp.o" -o journal2-widget  libshapedblur.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libKF6WindowSystem.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libLayerShellQtInterface.so.6.6.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
